# Mike Answers

## Description
Mike Answers is a private, bring-your-own-key AI tutoring and research assistant. Browser-first SPA with no account requirement. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, Claude, OpenRouter, and 30+ AI providers.

## Key Features
- Private AI tutoring — all API keys stay on-device (session or encrypted local storage)
- Conservative Christian tutoring posture for worldview, moral, and theological questions
- Multi-provider: Gemini, ChatGPT/OpenAI, Claude/Anthropic, xAI, Venice.ai, OpenRouter, local Ollama/LM Studio
- Image solving via screenshots and paste
- Voice input and audio transcription (Gemini)
- Current events, Word of the Day, Verse of the Day
- Peer-to-peer workspace sync via encrypted QR or WebRTC
- PWA installable with offline support
- Free tier available via OpenRouter free models

## Tech Stack
React 19, TypeScript, Vite 6, Tailwind CSS 4, Cloudflare Workers

## Deployment
Static SPA deployed on Cloudflare Workers. No server-side runtime. All inference is browser-to-provider direct.

## Homepage
https://mike-net.top
